name: Elijah Beese

skills: Incident response and major incident handling (Tier 1)

clearance_relevance: Active Secret Security Clearance; Top Secret adjudication in progress. Eligible for cleared roles (DoD/Defense contractors). Security+ satisfies many DoD 8570 baseline requirements for entry IAT/IASAE roles (per employer criteria).
resume_summary: Entry-level cybersecurity and network operations professional completing a B.S. in Cybersecurity (May 2026). Experience in a 24x7 Technology Operations Center at Tampa Electric performing Level 1 monitoring, troubleshooting, and incident escalation across servers, networks, and applications; supports security posture and disaster recovery. Prior AFIT joint-service cyber internship with exposure to intrusion detection, network forensics, and malware triage. Army ROTC cadet commissioning as a 2LT Cyber Officer (17A). Hands-on with Splunk, SolarWinds, VMware/vSphere, Active Directory, AWS/Azure, and tools like Nmap, Nessus, Burp, Kali. Certifications include Security+ and ISC2 CC. Active Secret clearance; TS adjudication in progress.
